basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Superintendent, Accounts Officer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Gorakhpur (AIIMS Gorakhpur)
basic_details.post_name: Medical Superintendent, Accounts Officer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Gorakhpur (AIIMS Gorakhpur) Medical Superintendent, Accounts Officer and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 18 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Gorakhpur Deputation Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age limit is 56 years as on last date of receipt of application.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years as on the last date of receipt of application. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate (Refer to Annexure-A for detailed eligibility criteria)
qualification.details: Medical Superintendent: Medical qualification included in the I or II Schedule or Part II of the third Schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956. Post graduate qualification, e.g., M.D. or M.S. or a recognized qualification equivalent thereto OR M.H.A. (Masters in Hospital Administration) or a post Graduate Degree recognized as equivalent to M.H.A. by the Medical Council of India. Ten years' experience in Hospital Administration in Hospitals after obtaining the P.G. Degree in a senior position, preferably in hospitals with 300 beds. Registrar: A graduate of recognized University. Seven years' experience of administration on supervisory capacity or as a teacher in a University/Teaching institution including conduct or examination and admission and assignment of teaching programmes for undergraduate and postgraduate etc. Desirable: A postgraduate Degree. Executive Engineer (Civil): Holding analogous posts on regular basis. OR Assistant Engineer (Civil) with 5 years regular service in the grade pay of Rs. 5400/. OR Junior Engineer (Civil) with 7 years of regular service in the grade pay of Rs. 4600/. Executive Engineer (Electrical): Holding analogous posts on regular basis, or Assistant Engineer {Electric} with 5 years regular service in the grade pay of Rs. 5400/- or Junior Engineer (Electric) with 7 years of regular service in the grade pay of Rs. 4600. Senior Accounts Officer: Holding analogous posts on regular basis. OR With 5 years regular service in the relevant field in the grade pay of Rs. 5400/-. Accounts Officer: Holding analogous posts on regular basis, OR With 2/3 years regular service in the relevant field in the grade pay of Rs. 4800/4600 respectively.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 10 to Level 14 (7th CPC) plus NPA for Medical Superintendent
salary_details.details: Medical Superintendent: Level - 14 (Rs. 144200-218200) + NPA Registrar: Level - 12 (Rs. 78800-209200) Executive Engineer (Civil): Level - 11 (Rs. 67700-208700) Executive Engineer (Electrical): Level - 11 (Rs. 67700-208700) Senior Accounts Officer: Level - 11 (Rs. 67700-208700) Accounts Officer: Level - 10 (Rs. 56100-177500)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Gorakhpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://aiimsgorakhpur.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Gorakhpur Deputation Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Deputation Posts at AIIMS Gorakhpur is 17 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Deputation Posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies available for various Deputation Posts at AIIMS Gorakhpur, including Medical Superintendent, Registrar, Executive Engineers, and Accounts Officers.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for some of these posts is a graduate degree. However, specific educational qualifications and experience vary for each post, and candidates must refer to Annexure-A in the official notification for detailed eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 56 years as on the last date of receipt of the application. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website and submit it through proper channel via speed post or registered A.D.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Medical Superintendent post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Medical Superintendent post is as per Level - 14 (Rs. 144200-218200) of the 7th CPC, plus Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA).

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification PDF for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the AIIMS Gorakhpur official website. A direct link is usually provided in the 'Important Links' section of job notification articles.

faq.question: Q8. What is the address for sending the application form?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted to the Recruitment Cell, Admin Block, Medical College Building, All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Kunraghat, Gorakhpur (Uttar Pradesh) 273008.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any application fees for these posts?
faq.answer: As per the information extracted, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for these deputation posts.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Deputation. This means candidates will be appointed on deputation from their parent government departments or organizations.
